name: You're Trapped in a Fuck Machine! Ver. 2
description:
|| Your bitchy coworker decides to play a trick on you ||

"Omg, you look so pathetic when you cum!"

As a technician, youвҖҷve been tasked with testing out the latest prototype: the AbsolutePleasure, a complex and advanced fuck machine. She's going to have her way with you and no one is going to stop her.
